items.title: Great game
items.summary: I just started 2-ish days ago and I’m having a lot of fun. If you like card strategy, give this a shot. The pull count is pretty generous from what I understand so far. My only real complaint is the translation is a bit off in the story (it’s not that far off. You can still understand the story pretty clearly, but you can tell when something isn’t quite right.)
items.author: LofiLoaf
